title: The Great Wall From Space Myth

scenes.text: You cannot actually see the Great Wall of China from space.
A popular claim says it is the only human structure visible from the Moon.
scenes.label: SEEN FROM THE MOON

scenes.text: Astronauts have confirmed you cannot see it unaided from orbit.
scenes.label: INVISIBLE TO THE EYE

scenes.text: It is thousands of miles long, but far too narrow to spot.
scenes.label: TOO NARROW TO SEE
scenes.sub: and it blends into the land

description: The Great Wall From Space Myth Follow for daily science!
